subcodes.title: Answer to Siyyid Ahmad Aqa-Zadih
subcodes.first_line: O thou who art young in years, tender of body, and freshly weaned from thy mother's milk! Praise be to God, who hath, through His command, brought into being whatsoever is in the heavens and the earth [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. یا صغیر السن یا رطب البدن یا قریب العهد من شرب اللبن الحمد لله الذی انشاء ما فی السموات و الارض بامره
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
